requirements.description: User can view all notes in a hierarchical list
Notes are displayed with their titles visible
User can see a sidebar or navigation to browse notes
User can access a search function
Search input field is visible or accessible
User can access an AI chat or assistant feature
Chat interface has an input field for questions
User can see a button or option to create a new note
New note creation is accessible from the main screen
Notes appear to support nesting or hierarchy
Indentation or folder structure is visible for nested notes
Editor area is visible when viewing/editing a note
Formatting toolbar or options are available
User can see block-level content (paragraphs, headings, lists)
App has mobile-appropriate navigation (bottom tabs or hamburger menu)
Touch targets appear appropriately sized for mobile
Content is readable without horizontal scrolling

requirement.description: User can view all notes in a hierarchical list

results.evidence: The screenshot displays a list of notes in a hierarchical structure, which satisfies the requirement.
results.notes: The notes are organized within a scrollable area and appear to be displayed in a structured manner, likely indicating categories or tags that may be used for organization.

requirement.description: Notes are displayed with their titles visible

results.evidence: In the screenshot provided, there are notes with their titles visible, but they appear to be overlapping and difficult to read.
results.notes: It is not possible to determine if all notes have their titles visible due to the overlap. To fully assess this requirement, it would be helpful to see a clearer image of the entire note list or to rearrange the notes for better visibility.

requirement.description: User can see a sidebar or navigation to browse notes

results.evidence: There is no visible sidebar or navigation in the screenshot to browse notes.
results.notes: It seems that either the app is not currently displaying the notes feature, or it's not accessible from this particular view within the app.

requirement.description: User can access a search function

results.evidence: In the screenshot provided, there is no visible search function or search icon. The UI elements present in the image are a navigation bar at the top with what appears to be a back button and a profile icon on the right.
results.notes: To fulfill this requirement, a search function would typically be found within the app's navigation menu or as a prominent feature within the content of the screen. In this case, it is neither present nor immediately visible.

requirement.description: Search input field is visible or accessible

results.evidence: There is no search input field visible in the image provided.

requirement.description: User can access an AI chat or assistant feature

results.evidence: The screenshot displays an AI chat or assistant feature. It shows a chat interface and buttons that suggest functionality for users to interact with.
results.notes: However, it is not clear if the feature is fully accessible or what its capabilities are. The text in the image does not provide enough information about the AI chat or assistant feature. To provide a more accurate assessment, additional details about the functionality and user interaction would be required.

requirement.description: Chat interface has an input field for questions

results.evidence: There is no input field for questions visible in the image provided.
results.notes: The image only shows a screenshot of a chat interface with text and some icons but no input field. To fully assess this requirement, additional screenshots or more context would be needed to determine if there's an input field hidden from view or if it was not included in the app at the time of testing.

requirement.description: User can see a button or option to create a new note

results.evidence: There is a button on the top right corner of the screenshot that says 'New Note'. This may be what the user interacts with to create a new note.
results.notes: The 'New Note' button is not clearly visible or distinguishable from other elements in the image, making it ambiguous whether it is functional and serves as an option to create a new note. Additionally, there are no visual cues that suggest how to interact with this button, such as an arrow or icon.

requirement.description: New note creation is accessible from the main screen

results.evidence: There is no visible 'New note creation' option or button on the main screen of this screenshot.
results.notes: It might be that this app uses a different approach to create new notes, such as a swipe or tap-to-create action. However, without additional context or information about other screens within the app, it is not possible to fully assess whether this requirement is met.

requirement.description: Notes appear to support nesting or hierarchy

results.evidence: The image provided does not show any indications of notes supporting nesting or hierarchy. There are no sub-elements or clear delineation to suggest a hierarchical structure.
results.notes: Based on the available information and the lack of visually distinct elements that relate to the specified requirement, it is not possible to determine if this requirement is met.

requirement.description: Indentation or folder structure is visible for nested notes

results.evidence: The screenshot provided does not show any visible indentation or folder structure for nested notes in the iOS app.
results.notes: It's difficult to determine if there are no nested notes or if they are hidden behind the current content. Additionally, there might be other states of the app where nesting is more apparent.

requirement.description: Editor area is visible when viewing/editing a note

results.evidence: In this screenshot, there is no visible editor area for editing a note. The image displays a simple text view without any interactive elements typically associated with an editor.
results.notes: To fully test the requirement, we would need to observe a different state of the app, such as when attempting to edit an existing note or create a new one.

requirement.description: Formatting toolbar or options are available

results.evidence: No formatting toolbar or options are visible in the provided screenshot.

requirement.description: User can see block-level content (paragraphs, headings, lists)

results.evidence: The screenshot shows a clear and distinct block editor interface where the user can see the structure of content in blocks, including headings and lists.
results.notes: No additional observations or suggestions based on this screenshot.

requirement.description: App has mobile-appropriate navigation (bottom tabs or hamburger menu)

results.evidence: In the screenshot, there is a visible navigation bar at the top of the screen which does not meet the requirement for mobile-appropriate navigation. This appears to be a desktop interface design rather than a mobile application design.
results.notes: It would be helpful to view different screens or states within the app to ensure consistency in the navigation design.

requirement.description: Touch targets appear appropriately sized for mobile

results.evidence: The button in the image appears to be too small for comfortable interaction on a mobile device.
results.notes: It is unclear if the rest of the app's touch targets meet the requirement. Further testing with other screens or states would be necessary.

requirement.description: Content is readable without horizontal scrolling

results.evidence: The image shows a screenshot of an iOS app interface where the content is not fully displayed within the viewport, requiring horizontal scrolling to view the entire content.
results.notes: To satisfy this requirement, it is necessary to ensure that all the content of the UI can be viewed without the need for horizontal scrolling. In this case, the text is split across two lines and scrolls horizontally. To improve readability, it would be beneficial to either adjust the layout of the app or increase the width of the viewport if possible.
